positioning_name: Kevin social-impact AI product growth operator
core_thesis: Kevin's strongest market position is not a single role title. It is a capability loop that connects social welfare financial problem definition, AI product specification, growth measurement, operating-data interpretation, social-impact evidence, and partner delegation.

public_safety.public_export_rule: Publish only capability levels, evidence categories, proof gaps, and improvement tasks. Keep private estimates, local paths, candidate records, account settings, and raw private source files outside this repo.

source_packets_summarized.source_name: IT Matters AI Selected application content
source_packets_summarized.public_use: Mission, product scope, impact ambition, social-worker pain points, AI capability claims, and validation gaps.
source_packets_summarized.public_boundary: No contact details, private attachments, raw file path, or unverified claim presented as final proof.

source_packets_summarized.source_name: FamilyFin GTM and growth planning materials
source_packets_summarized.public_use: Event-layer, funnel, and measurement proof categories.
source_packets_summarized.public_boundary: No GTM, GA4, Ads, or account configuration details.

source_packets_summarized.public_use: Direct-read, fallback, missing, and no-op source-quality logic.
source_packets_summarized.public_boundary: No private report links, raw account identifiers, or unreviewed daily operating details.

source_packets_summarized.public_use: Existing public-safe work lines, governance cards, tool prototypes, and weekly update logic.
source_packets_summarized.public_boundary: No real HR record, private workboard, or automatic employment decision.

positioning_levels.label: Domain executor
positioning_levels.market_meaning: Can perform social welfare, family finance education, or project coordination work inside a known process.
positioning_levels.proof_needed_to_hold: Clear domain vocabulary, service-context understanding, and safe case-boundary language.

positioning_levels.label: Cross-domain product operator
positioning_levels.market_meaning: Can translate social welfare problems into product workflows, reports, and partner tasks.
positioning_levels.proof_needed_to_hold: Product-flow maps, operating dashboards, stakeholder briefs, and workboard-ready task packages.

positioning_levels.label: AI product growth owner
positioning_levels.market_meaning: Can use measurement, experiments, and AI workflow design to improve activation, usage, and impact.
positioning_levels.proof_needed_to_hold: Production event proof, source-quality dashboard, growth experiments, and impact metric tree.

positioning_levels.label: Social-impact product lead
positioning_levels.market_meaning: Can lead a repeatable service model, partner delegation system, and third-party validated impact story.
positioning_levels.proof_needed_to_hold: Cross-team adoption, repeatable operating model, partner handoff proof, and external validation.

current_public_position.why: The evidence already shows domain depth, product planning, public-safe workflow governance, and measurement design. The next jump requires production measurement proof and repeatable improvement results.
current_public_position.risk_if_overclaimed: Without verified production event evidence and repeatable experiments, the story may look like planning strength rather than operating ownership.

capability_packages.package_name: Social welfare and family-finance problem definition
current_evidence_public: Application content frames financially vulnerable families and social-worker financial knowledge gaps.
Public capability map keeps welfare, finance, tool, and governance lines visible.
capability_packages.next_skill_to_build: Turn domain experience into reusable problem taxonomy and pain-point-to-feature map.
proof_to_collect: Pain point to function to metric matrix

capability_packages.package_name: AI product and tool workflow specification
current_evidence_public: Application content describes knowledge base, calculators, voice-to-text, risk assessment, family economic graph, and consultation flows.
Public review site already contains social-resource and finance-life prototype packages.
capability_packages.next_skill_to_build: Write concise product cards with data flow, validation criteria, forbidden fields, and stop conditions.

capability_packages.package_name: GTM, GA4, Ads, and funnel measurement
current_evidence_public: Growth planning materials define event-layer and funnel categories.
Operating report practice separates direct-read, fallback, missing, and no-op states.
capability_packages.next_skill_to_build: Close the loop from event plan to production proof to dashboard interpretation.

current_evidence_public: Daily report workflow preserves source-quality differences and fallback warnings.
Capability map uses no-op checkpoints instead of repeating stale work.
capability_packages.next_skill_to_build: Move from reporting what changed to testing why it changed.
proof_to_collect: Before, hypothesis, result, and next-step log

current_evidence_public: Application content contains large impact ambition, early adoption signals, training scale, and cross-sector direction.
Public site now has tool and governance artifacts that can become a portfolio map.
capability_packages.next_skill_to_build: Connect impact ambition to product usage and service outcomes without overstating unverified claims.

capability_packages.package_name: Partner training, work architecture, and delegation
current_evidence_public: HR schema, trial task, feedback loop, supervision profile, and workboard artifacts exist in public-safe form.
Work lines already separate Kevin, partner, Codex, and automation responsibilities.
capability_packages.next_skill_to_build: Use one low-risk work line to prove onboarding, review queue, and handoff rhythm.

ninety_day_roadmap.goal: Turn measurement design into credible proof.
tasks: Separate direct-read, fallback, missing, and no-op evidence in one view.
Draft two feature product cards with event specs.
ninety_day_roadmap.public_boundary: Publish only screenshots or summaries that contain no account identifiers, private user data, or private URLs.

ninety_day_roadmap.goal: Connect growth funnel to impact story.
tasks: Define meaningful action for the product.
Build weekly funnel and impact metric tree.
Create a claim-method validation note for application benefit claims.
ninety_day_roadmap.public_boundary: Mark unverified effect-size claims as claims until methodology is reviewed.

tasks: Pilot one partner trial task on a low-risk work line.
ninety_day_roadmap.public_boundary: No real candidate record, raw HR note, private financial record, or automatic people decision.

next_version_candidates.candidate: Create a public-safe product feature card pair for the two highest-leverage AI or measurement features.
Turn the 90-day roadmap into a weekly review dashboard with source-quality and proof status.
Prepare a private-only companion template for detailed compensation planning after Kevin approval.
